title: Release Note Drift Packet Briefing
summary: Signals about generated release notes, stale changelog entries, customer-facing accuracy, and reviewer workflow. Briefing focus: Advise how to improve generated release notes while keeping customer-facing claims accurate.

claims.text: Changelog audit: The generated notes covered 83% of merged changes, but 14% of entries described behavior that changed after final QA.
Customer success note: Customers value concise release notes, especially migration warnings and compatibility caveats.
Engineering workflow memo: Engineers can tag final-release deltas during QA, but they will not maintain a second changelog manually.

openQuestions: Confirm whether compliance review has newer follow-up data.
Confirm whether qa delta log has newer follow-up data.
recommendation: Use this as a fast first pass, then inspect source tension and citation support in the lab before treating the recommendation as shippable.
